meaning: n.眼睛,视力,眼光,观点,见解,眼状物,风吹来的方向,[气]风眼vt.看,注视,在...上打眼
examples: The film has a painterly eye.
His left eye squints a little.
I have something in my eye.
Just like Windows XP, Lindows initially sets the screen to a flickery, eye-busting 60Hz refresh rate.
The dollar could come back without warning, so don't take your eye off the market.
